titles.title: Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 8035) to amend the FISA Amendments Act of 2008 to extend the authorities of title VII of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act of 1978 through October 20, 2027, and for other purposes.

Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 8035) to amend the FISA Amendments Act of 2008 to extend the authorities of title VII of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act of 1978 through October 20, 2027, and for other purposes.

action.text: The House Committee on Rules reported an original measure, H. Rept. 119-610, by Mr. Scott, Austin.
Rule provides for consideration of H.R. 8035 with 1 hour of general debate. Motion to recommit allowed. Bill is closed to amendments.

calendar.text: Placed on the House Calendar, Calendar No. 71.

action.text: DEBATE - The House proceeded with one hour of debate on H. Res. 1175.

vote.text: On agreeing to the resolution Failed by recorded vote: 197 - 228 (Roll no. 124).

action.text: Motion to reconsider laid on the table Agreed to without objection.

bill.summary: This resolution provides for the consideration of the bill (H.R. 8035) to amend the FISA Amendments Act of 2008 to extend the authorities of title VII of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act of 1978 through October 20, 2027, and for other purposes.
